name: twincat-validator
description: Validate and auto-fix TwinCAT XML files (.TcPOU, .TcIO, .TcDUT, .TcGVL) with AI-powered assistance
long_description: An MCP server that validates, auto-fixes, and scaffolds TwinCAT 3 XML files. Provides 16 tools covering structural validation, 21 IEC 61131-3 OOP checks, deterministic auto-fix pipelines, canonical skeleton generation, and batch orchestration workflows.

tools.name: validate_file
tools.description: Full validation of a single TwinCAT file

tools.name: validate_batch
tools.description: Validate multiple files matching glob patterns

tools.name: validate_for_import
tools.description: Quick critical-only check for import readiness

tools.name: check_specific
tools.description: Run a named subset of validation checks

tools.name: get_validation_summary
tools.description: Return a 0-100 health score with issue counts

tools.name: autofix_file
tools.description: Apply all safe auto-fixes to a single file

tools.name: generate_skeleton
tools.description: Generate a canonical deterministic XML skeleton

tools.name: extract_methods_to_xml
tools.description: Promote inline METHOD blocks to XML elements

tools.name: process_twincat_single
tools.description: Full enforced pipeline: validate → autofix → validate

tools.name: process_twincat_batch
tools.description: Full enforced pipeline across multiple files

tools.name: verify_determinism_batch
tools.description: Run pipeline twice and report idempotence stability

tools.name: get_effective_oop_policy
tools.description: Resolve the active OOP validation policy for a path

tools.name: get_context_pack
tools.description: Return curated knowledge-base entries scoped to a workflow stage
